metadata.title:
FREE SPEECH FIGHT

Now that the first long fight

pages.raw_text:
Now that the first long fight
with the l. w. w. seems nearly
ended, what has the struggle
between the street speakers
and the police department cost
the city of Spokane? 1t is a
hard question to answer, for
there have been so many SEEM
ingly inconsequential angles to
the fight that have added to
the big bill of expense that an
exact summing of the entire
expense would take weeks of
consideration and expense.


In round numbers, it is esti-
mated that this fight has cost
the taxpayers of Spokane $10.-
900. This amount or there
abouts is claimed to have been
expended for food, special POI
lice to aid the regular depart
ment to cope with the situa-
ton, medical attention, extra
fuel and other sundry ex-
penses. In addition to these
expenses, 1t is declared that
damage suits asking for tn
payment of about $4,000 VIII
be filed against the city.
